name: Yam Som-o (Thai Pomelo-Chicken Salad)
recipeIngredient: Fresh red chile, julienned for garnish
recipeInstructions:
Chill.
Hand shred the chicken. Add chicken and shrimp to pomelo.
Mix together chopped red chile with fish sauce, sugar, lime juice, and coriander; toss with pomelo chicken mixture.
Arrange lettuce on a serving platter. Put fruit mixture over lettuce. Top with peanuts and 2 tablespoons Crisp Fried Shallot Flakes. Garnish with red chile slivers.
Serves 4 to 6 as a salad entree.
CRISPY FRIED SHALLOT FLAKES:
Slice shallots into thin slices, ensuring even thickness for consistent cooking.
Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add shallots and fry slowly until browned and crisp, about 5-10 minutes. Ensure moisture is fully cooked out. Drain on paper towel. Store in an air-tight container. Keeps several weeks.
